description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in smooth, cognac-brown leather. The sofa features three individual seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all of which are plush and slightly rounded for comfort. The armrests are angled outward and padded, providing a contemporary silhouette that complements the overall design. The back of the sofa is gently curved and fully upholstered, maintaining a clean and cohesive appearance from all sides. The sofa stands on four slender, black metal legs that are slightly splayed, giving it a light and elevated look. The upholstery is unadorned, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching, emphasizing a minimalist and sophisticated aesthetic.
description: A modern, cognac-brown leather sofa with three plush seat and back cushions, angled padded armrests, and slender black metal legs. The design is sleek, minimalist, and visually cohesive from all sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing three individual seat and back cushions, angled padded armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the slender black leg at the corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, gently curved backrest and the clean, uninterrupted leather upholstery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and leg design, emphasizing the sofa's symmetrical profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all uniform in size and attached, arranged in a linear configuration.
attribute_armrest_style: Angled, outward-flared armrests that are padded and rise slightly above the seat level, with a smooth, continuous leather finish and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, black metal legs positioned at the corners, slightly splayed outward, with a minimalist and exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous backrest with three attached, plush back cushions, gently curved and unadorned.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid cognac-brown leather with a smooth, untextured finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
